 {"id":"bd-mhhb","title":"Read operations should not modify database file","description":"Read-only operations (bd list, bd ready, bd show) modify the database file. Every open sets WAL pragma, runs schema/migrations, and checkpoints on close. Need sqlite.NewReadOnly() that opens with mode=ro, skips WAL/schema/migrations, and skips checkpoint. See GH#804.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-30T16:27:13.416643-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2025-12-30T16:46:49.921614-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T16:46:49.921614-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented read-only mode for SQLite. Read commands now use NewReadOnly() which opens with mode=ro, skips WAL pragma/schema/migrations, and skips checkpoint on close."}

 {"id":"bd-mol-0qm","title":"mol-beads-release","description":"attached_args: Release v0.38.0 - execute each step in order, verify before proceeding to next

Release checklist for beads version 0.38.0.

This molecule ensures all release steps are completed properly.
Variable: 0.38.0 - target version (e.g., 0.35.0)

## Step: update-release-notes
Update cmd/bd/info.go with release notes for 0.38.0.

Add a new VersionChange entry at the top of versionChanges slice:
```go
{
    Version: "0.38.0",
    Date:    "YYYY-MM-DD",
    Changes: []string{
        "NEW: Feature description",
        "FIX: Bug fix description",
        "IMPROVED: Enhancement description",
    },
},
```

Run `git log --oneline v<previous>..HEAD` to see what changed.

## Step: update-changelog
Update CHANGELOG.md with detailed release notes.

Add a new section after [Unreleased]:
```markdown
## [0.38.0] - YYYY-MM-DD

### Added
- **Feature name** (issue-id) - Description

### Changed
- **Change description** (issue-id)

### Fixed
- **Bug fix** (issue-id) - Description
```

Sort by importance, not chronologically.
Needs: update-release-notes

## Step: bump-version
Run the version bump script.

```bash
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.38.0
```

This updates version in all files:
- cmd/bd/version.go
- .claude-plugin/*.json
- integrations/beads-mcp/pyproject.toml
- npm-package/package.json
- Hook templates

Needs: update-changelog

## Step: run-tests
Run tests and verify lint passes.

```bash
go test -short ./...
```

CI will run full lint, but fix any obvious issues first.
Needs: bump-version

## Step: commit-release
Commit the release changes.

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "chore: bump version to v0.38.0"
```

Needs: run-tests

## Step: push-and-tag
Push commit and create release tag.

```bash
git push origin main
git tag v0.38.0
git push origin v0.38.0
```

This triggers GitHub Actions release workflow.
Needs: commit-release

## Step: wait-for-ci
Wait for GitHub Actions to complete.

Monitor: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/actions

CI will:
- Build binaries via GoReleaser
- Create GitHub Release with assets
- Publish to npm (@beads/bd)
- Publish to PyPI (beads-mcp)
- Update Homebrew tap

Wait until all jobs succeed (~5-10 min).
Needs: push-and-tag

## Step: verify-release
Verify the release is complete.

```bash
# Check GitHub release
gh release view v0.38.0

# Check Homebrew
brew update && brew info steveyegge/beads/bd

# Check npm
npm view @beads/bd version

# Check PyPI
pip index versions beads-mcp
```

Needs: wait-for-ci

## Step: update-local
Update local installations.

```bash
# Upgrade Homebrew
brew upgrade steveyegge/beads/bd

# Or install from source
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.38.0 --install

# Install MCP locally
pip install -e integrations/beads-mcp

# Restart daemons
pkill -f "bd daemon" || true
```

Verify: `bd --version` shows 0.38.0
Needs: verify-release

## Step: manual-publish
(Optional) Manual publish if CI failed.

```bash
# npm (requires npm login)
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.38.0 --publish-npm

# PyPI (requires TWINE credentials)
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.38.0 --publish-pypi

# Or both
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.38.0 --publish-all
```

Only needed if CI publishing failed.

 {"id":"bd-mol-p7i","title":"beads-release","description":"Beads release workflow - from version bump to verified release.

This formula orchestrates a complete release cycle:
1. Preflight checks (clean git, up to date)
2. Documentation updates (CHANGELOG, info.go)
3. Version bump (all components)
4. Git operations (commit, tag, push)
5. CI verification (GitHub Actions)
6. Artifact verification (GitHub, npm, PyPI)
7. Local installation update
8. Daemon restart

## Usage

```bash
bd wisp create beads-release --var version=0.37.0
```

Or assign to a polecat:
```bash
gt sling beads/polecats/p1 --formula beads-release --var version=0.37.0
```","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"beads/crew/emma","created_at":"2025-12-29T16:29:32.298557-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T17:02:15.202404-08:00","close_reason":"v0.41.0 released to GitHub, PyPI, and npm","deleted_at":"2025-12-29T17:02:15.202404-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"epic"}
-{"id":"bd-mol-pjc","title":"Gate: gh:run release.yml","description":"Async gate for step await-ci","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"gate","created_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.393319-08:00","updated_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.393319-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mol-pjc","depends_on_id":"bd-mol-wba","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.401429-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/dave"}],"await_type":"gh:run","await_id":"release.yml","timeout":1800000000000}
+{"id":"bd-mol-pjc","title":"Gate: gh:run release.yml","description":"Async gate for step await-ci","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"gate","created_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.393319-08:00","updated_at":"2026-01-04T23:17:34.320037-08:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T23:17:34.320037-08:00","close_reason":"GitHub Actions release workflow completed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mol-pjc","depends_on_id":"bd-mol-wba","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.401429-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/dave"}],"await_type":"gh:run","await_id":"release.yml","timeout":1800000000000}
 {"id":"bd-mol-pze","title":"mol-beads-release","description":"Release checklist for beads version 0.99.0.

This molecule ensures all release steps are completed properly.
Variable: 0.99.0 - target version (e.g., 0.35.0)

## Step: update-release-notes
Update cmd/bd/info.go with release notes for 0.99.0.

Add a new VersionChange entry at the top of versionChanges slice:
```go
{
    Version: "0.99.0",
    Date:    "YYYY-MM-DD",
    Changes: []string{
        "NEW: Feature description",
        "FIX: Bug fix description",
        "IMPROVED: Enhancement description",
    },
},
```

Run `git log --oneline v<previous>..HEAD` to see what changed.

## Step: update-changelog
Update CHANGELOG.md with detailed release notes.

Add a new section after [Unreleased]:
```markdown
## [0.99.0] - YYYY-MM-DD

### Added
- **Feature name** (issue-id) - Description

### Changed
- **Change description** (issue-id)

### Fixed
- **Bug fix** (issue-id) - Description
```

Sort by importance, not chronologically.
Needs: update-release-notes

## Step: bump-version
Run the version bump script.

```bash
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.99.0
```

This updates version in all files:
- cmd/bd/version.go
- .claude-plugin/*.json
- integrations/beads-mcp/pyproject.toml
- npm-package/package.json
- Hook templates

Needs: update-changelog

## Step: run-tests
Run tests and verify lint passes.

```bash
go test -short ./...
```

CI will run full lint, but fix any obvious issues first.
Needs: bump-version

## Step: commit-release
Commit the release changes.

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "chore: bump version to v0.99.0"
```

Needs: run-tests

## Step: push-and-tag
Push commit and create release tag.

```bash
git push origin main
git tag v0.99.0
git push origin v0.99.0
```

This triggers GitHub Actions release workflow.
Needs: commit-release

## Step: wait-for-ci
Wait for GitHub Actions to complete.

Monitor: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/actions

CI will:
- Build binaries via GoReleaser
- Create GitHub Release with assets
- Publish to npm (@beads/bd)
- Publish to PyPI (beads-mcp)
- Update Homebrew tap

Wait until all jobs succeed (~5-10 min).
Needs: push-and-tag

## Step: verify-release
Verify the release is complete.

```bash
# Check GitHub release
gh release view v0.99.0

# Check Homebrew
brew update && brew info steveyegge/beads/bd

# Check npm
npm view @beads/bd version

# Check PyPI
pip index versions beads-mcp
```

Needs: wait-for-ci

## Step: update-local
Update local installations.

```bash
# Upgrade Homebrew
brew upgrade steveyegge/beads/bd

# Or install from source
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.99.0 --install

# Install MCP locally
pip install -e integrations/beads-mcp

# Restart daemons
pkill -f "bd daemon" || true
```

Verify: `bd --version` shows 0.99.0
Needs: verify-release

## Step: manual-publish
(Optional) Manual publish if CI failed.

```bash
# npm (requires npm login)
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.99.0 --publish-npm

# PyPI (requires TWINE credentials)
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.99.0 --publish-pypi

# Or both
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.99.0 --publish-all
```

Only needed if CI publishing failed.

-{"id":"bd-mol-wba","title":"beads-release","description":"Beads release workflow v2 - gate-aware async release.

This formula orchestrates a complete release cycle with async gates:

Phase 1 (Polecat Work):
  1. Preflight checks (clean git, up to date)
  2. Documentation updates (CHANGELOG, info.go)
  3. Version bump (all components)
  4. Git operations (commit, tag, push)

Gate (Async Wait):
  5. await-ci: Gate on GitHub Actions release.yml completion

Phase 2 (Parallel Verification):
  6. Verify GitHub release, npm package, PyPI package (concurrent)

Phase 3 (Installation):
  7. Local installation update
  8. Daemon restart

## Usage

```bash
bd mol wisp create beads-release --var version=0.44.0
```

Or assign to a polecat:
```bash
gt sling beads/polecats/p1 --formula beads-release --var version=0.44.0
```

The polecat will complete Phase 1, then signal phase-complete. The gate blocks
until release.yml finishes. A new polecat (or the same one) resumes for Phases 2-3.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.390421-08:00","updated_at":"2026-01-04T23:05:15.390421-08:00"}
+{"id":"bd-mol-wba","title":"beads-release","description":"Beads release workflow v2 - gate-aware async release.

This formula orchestrates a complete release cycle with async gates:

Phase 1 (Polecat Work):
  1. Preflight checks (clean git, up to date)
  2. Documentation updates (CHANGELOG, info.go)
  3. Version bump (all components)
  4. Git operations (commit, tag, push)

Gate (Async Wait):
  5. await-ci: Gate on GitHub Actions release.yml completion

Phase 2 (Parallel Verification):
  6. Verify GitHub release, npm package, PyPI package (concurrent)

Phase 3 (Installation):
  7. Local installation update
  8. Daemon restart

## Usage

```bash
bd mol wisp create beads-release --var version=0.44.0
```

Or assign to a polecat:
```bash
gt sling beads/polecats/p1 --formula beads-release --var version=0.44.0
```

The polecat will complete Phase 1, then signal phase-complete. The gate blocks
until release.yml finishes. A new polecat (or the same one) resumes for Phases 2-3.

 {"id":"bd-mol-xga","title":"mol-beads-release","description":"Release checklist for beads version 0.37.0.

This molecule ensures all release steps are completed properly.
Variable: 0.37.0 - target version (e.g., 0.35.0)

## Step: update-release-notes
Update cmd/bd/info.go with release notes for 0.37.0.

Add a new VersionChange entry at the top of versionChanges slice:
```go
{
    Version: "0.37.0",
    Date:    "YYYY-MM-DD",
    Changes: []string{
        "NEW: Feature description",
        "FIX: Bug fix description",
        "IMPROVED: Enhancement description",
    },
},
```

Run `git log --oneline v<previous>..HEAD` to see what changed.

## Step: update-changelog
Update CHANGELOG.md with detailed release notes.

Add a new section after [Unreleased]:
```markdown
## [0.37.0] - YYYY-MM-DD

### Added
- **Feature name** (issue-id) - Description

### Changed
- **Change description** (issue-id)

### Fixed
- **Bug fix** (issue-id) - Description
```

Sort by importance, not chronologically.
Needs: update-release-notes

## Step: bump-version
Run the version bump script.

```bash
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.37.0
```

This updates version in all files:
- cmd/bd/version.go
- .claude-plugin/*.json
- integrations/beads-mcp/pyproject.toml
- npm-package/package.json
- Hook templates

Needs: update-changelog

## Step: run-tests
Run tests and verify lint passes.

```bash
go test -short ./...
```

CI will run full lint, but fix any obvious issues first.
Needs: bump-version

## Step: commit-release
Commit the release changes.

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "chore: bump version to v0.37.0"
```

Needs: run-tests

## Step: push-and-tag
Push commit and create release tag.

```bash
git push origin main
git tag v0.37.0
git push origin v0.37.0
```

This triggers GitHub Actions release workflow.
Needs: commit-release

## Step: wait-for-ci
Wait for GitHub Actions to complete.

Monitor: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/actions

CI will:
- Build binaries via GoReleaser
- Create GitHub Release with assets
- Publish to npm (@beads/bd)
- Publish to PyPI (beads-mcp)
- Update Homebrew tap

Wait until all jobs succeed (~5-10 min).
Needs: push-and-tag

## Step: verify-release
Verify the release is complete.

```bash
# Check GitHub release
gh release view v0.37.0

# Check Homebrew
brew update && brew info steveyegge/beads/bd

# Check npm
npm view @beads/bd version

# Check PyPI
pip index versions beads-mcp
```

Needs: wait-for-ci

## Step: update-local
Update local installations.

```bash
# Upgrade Homebrew
brew upgrade steveyegge/beads/bd

# Or install from source
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.37.0 --install

# Install MCP locally
pip install -e integrations/beads-mcp

# Restart daemons
pkill -f "bd daemon" || true
```

Verify: `bd --version` shows 0.37.0
Needs: verify-release

## Step: manual-publish
(Optional) Manual publish if CI failed.

```bash
# npm (requires npm login)
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.37.0 --publish-npm

# PyPI (requires TWINE credentials)
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.37.0 --publish-pypi

# Or both
./scripts/bump-version.sh 0.37.0 --publish-all
```

Only needed if CI publishing failed.
